# Rosa (AIO PM Team)

Rosa is on the AIO project-management team working under `[[euclid-wong|Euclid]]`. First surfaced in the wiki via `2026-05-13-aio-pm-meeting`, where she received the Prime Radiant architecture demo alongside Euclid. Owns the **dynamic dashboards and visualisation prompts** workstream — a longer-horizon Prime Radiant deliverable that surfaces knowledge-base data once ingestion is stable.
